footnote_legend.text: The fair value of each debt investment was determined using significant unobservable inputs and such investments are considered to be Level 3 within the Fair Value Hierarchy. See Note 3 “Investment Valuations and Fair Va

Loan was on non-accrual status as of December 31, 2025. SOFR - Secured Overnight Financing Rate, generally 1-Month or 3-Month PIK - Payment-In-Kind Aggregate acquisitions and aggregate dispositions of investments, other
